data.body: Attestation (attest.py): build_manifest ('plan-review: PASS' + material fingerprint), sign_plan_review (reuses rebar.signing.sign_manifest -> SIGNATURE event), claim_gate_check (certified + code-HEAD freshness + material-edit invalidation; fail-CLOSED on unverifiable). material_fingerprint binds description/AC/file_impact/decomposition. Interface-tested. verify-completion: PASS.
